mano_cua.result_summary: 测试需要页面中有设置scroll-margin的目标元素和scroll-padding的滚动容器，demo页面是通用展示页无此CSS配置。且需要精确像素级判断scrollTo停止位置是否正确计算了偏移量，mano-cua视觉检查无法确认。同lenis-68：库级别fix在通用demo中无法测试。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Demo page doesn't have elements with scroll-margin/scroll-padding CSS properties. Test requires pixel-level position verification impossible via visual inspection.
